# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

path.repo: ["/mnt/backup"]
repository:
  s3_repository:
    type: s3
    settings:
      bucket: my_backup_bucket
      region: us-east-1
      base_path: elasticsearch_snapshots
cloud.aws:
  access_key: YOUR_ACCESS_KEY
  secret_key: YOUR_SECRET_KEY
  region: us-east-1
index:
  lifecycle:
    name: "my_snapshot_lifecycle"
    managed: true
    snapshot:
      policy:
        schedule: "0 30 1 * * ?"
        repository: s3_repository
snapshots:
  restore:
    repository: s3_repository
    snapshot: my_first_snapshot
    indices: my_index
